category_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README describe a terminal interface for managing Docker containers and services.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is dockly; official GitHub README and project page use Dockly.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains install, usage, command-line options, Docker support, and FAQ documentation.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository is linked from the official homepage in source_facts.homepage and opened as lirantal/dockly.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README identify Docker container/service/image management from a terminal UI.
